endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroup}/providers/Microsoft.AzureBridge.Admin/activations/{activationName}/downloadedProducts
endpoints.description: Get a list of downloaded products.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUP}} with a real resourcegroup. Replace {{ACTIVATIONNAME}} with a real activationname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroup}/providers/Microsoft.AzureBridge.Admin/activations/{activationName}/downloadedProducts/{productName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUP}} with a real resourcegroup. Replace {{PRODUCTNAME}} with a real productname. Replace {{ACTIVATIONNAME}} with a real activationname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroup}/providers/Microsoft.AzureBridge.Admin/activations/{activationName}/downloadedProducts/{productName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUP}} with a real resourcegroup. Replace {{PRODUCTNAME}} with a real productname. Replace {{ACTIVATIONNAME}} with a real activationname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroup}/providers/Microsoft.AzureBridge.Admin/activations/{activationName}/downloadedProducts/{productName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUP}} with a real resourcegroup. Replace {{PRODUCTNAME}} with a real productname. Replace {{ACTIVATIONNAME}} with a real activationname.
